# Wolves Storage Sussex

> Secure managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. LAPADA accredited, fully insured, 24/7 CCTV.

Family-run, fully managed containerised storage across West Sussex, based in Ashington (Doryln House, London Road, Pulborough RH20 3JT). We pack, collect, seal and store your belongings in an alarmed, fully insured indoor warehouse, then redeliver — no self-storage unit to drive to. Trading since 2016. LAPADA accredited, Checkatrade-verified, 5.0/5 from 478 reviews. From £15/week, no deposit. Phone 01903 893731.

- [Home](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/): Secure managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. LAPADA accredited, fully insured, 24/7 CCTV.

## Storage services
- [Storage Solutions](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/storage-solutions.html): Secure, fully managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. No deposit, fully insured. Get a free quote.
- [Long-Term Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/long-term-storage.html): Affordable long-term storage in West Sussex from £15/week. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV, no deposit — ideal for emigrating, renovations & downsizing.
- [Short-Term Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/short-term-storage.html): Flexible short-term storage in West Sussex from £15/week. No deposit, weekly terms, fast collection — perfect for moves & chain delays.
- [Business Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/business-storage.html): Secure business storage in West Sussex from £15/week — stock, archives & equipment. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV, collection & redelivery.
- [Furniture Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/furniture-storage.html): Furniture storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We blanket-wrap, collect & seal furniture in secure containers. Fully insured. Get a free quote.

## How it works, pricing & guides
- [How It Works](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/how-it-works.html): How fully managed storage in West Sussex works: we quote, pack, collect, store in secure containers and redeliver. From £15/week, no deposit.
- [Pricing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/pricing.html): Transparent storage prices in West Sussex from £15/week. No deposit or hidden fees, flexible weekly & 4-week terms; collection quoted upfront.
- [Storage Size Guide](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/storage-size-guide.html): How much storage do you need? Our West Sussex size guide shows what fits in a 250 cu ft container, room by room. From £15/week, no deposit.
